interaction.prompt: Regroup. Your LD has the puck and is looking for an option. Tap the spot YOU should be in to give him a clean middle-lane outlet.

feedback.right: Strong-side, just below the red line — gives the LD a short option, lets you turn up-ice with speed once you receive it.
feedback.wrong: Don't crowd the puck-carrier and don't drift past the red line. Hold middle-lane support a stride below the red.

tip: Regroup support: middle-lane center, just below the red line. Close enough to be an outlet, far enough to attack with speed.
why: Center's job on a regroup is to be the safety valve. Too close = no room to receive. Too high = offside risk + no time to turn. The pocket is just below the red.
